full_text:
Du Yu (Yuankai) 杜預 (元凱)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Yu (杜預), styledYuankai (元凱). Served Jin to unification. The Field Marshal that led the invasion of Wu. Du Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Du Yu lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
